home.empty_hero_subtitle: No events scheduled. Let's create your first one.
home.loading_vendors_subtitle: Finding nearby event partners for you.
home.no_vendors_subtitle: Try another location or check back later.

plan.title: Plan your event
plan.subtitle: Fill in the details below to start organizing your perfect celebration.
plan.footer: You can change these details later in your planner.
plan.required_error: Please enter an event name and location.

wishlist.name_helper: Give your collection a memorable name for easy sharing.
wishlist.url_helper: We'll try to fetch the image and price for you.
wishlist.valid_url_error: Paste a valid item URL first.

registry.success_subtitle: Your {count} items are now ready for sharing.

chat.intro: Hello! I'm your Evergreen Assistant. Need help finding the perfect venue, managing your budget, or choosing a catering package? Ask me anything!
chat.local_reply: I can help with that. For now, I recommend comparing vendors by rating, location, availability, and package details before booking.

profile.copyright: © 2024 Evergreen Event Planning Solutions. All Rights Reserved.

editProfile.title: Edit Profile
editProfile.subtitle: Update your personal details and account settings.
editProfile.photo_helper: JPG, GIF or PNG. Max size 2MB.
editProfile.confirm_deactivate_body: This will disable your account access. You can cancel and keep editing your profile.

security.title: Security Settings
security.intro: Manage your account protection, authentication methods, and monitor active sessions.
security.auth_app_subtitle: Use Google Authenticator or Authy to generate secure codes.
security.sms_subtitle: Receive login codes via text to your phone number ending in **82.
security.audit_text: Your current security score is 85%. To reach 100%, we recommend enabling SMS backup and updating your recovery email.
security.danger_subtitle: Temporarily disable your account. Your profile and events will be hidden from the community until you reactivate.

notifications.title: Notification Settings
notifications.subtitle: Choose how you want to be notified about your upcoming events and team communications.
notifications.event_reminders_desc: Stay on top of your schedule with timely alerts for your upcoming events.
notifications.push_desc: Receive alerts on your mobile device
notifications.email_summaries_desc: Daily agenda and weekly event reports
notifications.vendor_quotes_desc: Updates regarding your vendor bids and contract approvals.
notifications.quote_submission_desc: Alert when a vendor submits a new proposal
notifications.platform_updates_desc: News about Evergreen feature releases and security updates.
notifications.product_features_desc: Be the first to know about new tools

help.subtitle: Our support team is available 24/7 to assist with your sustainable event needs.
